title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ansible-freeipa bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ansible-freeipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: [ansible-freeipa] Add support for DNS-over-TLS for ipaclient, ipareplica and ipaserver roles - RHEL-10.1
[RFE] [ansible-freeipa] Provide playbook compatibility in Ansible freeipa/idm RPM - RHEL-10.1
[ansible-freeipa] Rebase to latest version for RHEL-10.1
[ansible-freeipa] ipaclient: client_dns has new statestore arg with IPA change e6445b8 - RHEL-10.1

full_text:
An update for ansible-freeipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
